articles.title_en: MONRE Inaugurates Major Wastewater Plant in Ho Chi Minh City by 2026, Boosting Urban Resilience
articles.summary_en: MONRE oversees the 2026 operational launch of the Tan Binh WWTP, significantly boosting HCMC's wastewater treatment capacity.

articles.title_en: MONRE Unveils 2026 National Strategy for Industrial Wastewater Discharge Standards
articles.summary_en: MONRE introduces stringent national standards and enforcement for industrial wastewater discharge, effective 2026.

articles.title_en: International Consortium Funds Mekong Delta Water Treatment and Salinity Control for 2026
articles.summary_en: MONRE partners with an international consortium on 2026 projects addressing Mekong Delta water quality and salinity.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Stricter Waste Segregation Sees Mixed Public Response, Enforcement Begins
articles.summary_en: Nationwide waste segregation enforcement in Vietnam faces initial public compliance challenges and ongoing education efforts.

articles.title_en: Waste-to-Energy Projects Accelerate as Vietnam Enhances Solid Waste Infrastructure
articles.summary_en: New waste segregation fuels major investments in modern treatment plants across Vietnam, tackling rising urban waste.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's 2026 Waste Management Enforcement: Challenges and Policy Adaptations
articles.summary_en: While progress made, nationwide enforcement of waste regulations in Vietnam faces ongoing hurdles, prompting policy review.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $350M for Vietnam's Green Infrastructure and Climate Resilience
articles.summary_en: ADB approves $350M for Vietnam's green infrastructure, boosting renewable energy and climate resilience for sustainable growth.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures $280M ADB Loan for Digital Connectivity Expansion
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights funding for Vietnam's digital infrastructure, enhancing internet access and e-governance in remote areas.

articles.title_en: ADB Commits $400M to Improve Urban Transport in Major Vietnamese Cities
articles.summary_en: ADB loan supports sustainable urban transport development in Vietnam, focusing on metro expansion and bus rapid transit systems.

articles.title_en: ADB-backed Central Vietnam Water Project Fully Operational by Q3 2026
articles.summary_en: Major ADB-funded clean water and sanitation project in Central Vietnam begins full operations, benefiting 500,000 residents.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $150M for Mekong Delta Wastewater Improvement Phase II
articles.summary_en: ADB approves significant loan for phase two of Mekong Delta wastewater treatment, targeting improved environmental health by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Urban Areas See Clean Water Access Boost Post-ADB Investment
articles.summary_en: Report highlights substantial progress in urban clean water access across Vietnam, driven by ongoing ADB sanitation programs.

articles.title_en: World Bank Commits $250M for Vietnam's Mekong Delta Water Resilience by 2026
articles.summary_en: New World Bank funding boosts Vietnam's Mekong Delta water supply and climate resilience efforts for 2026.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Urban Water Project Exceeds 2026 Environmental Targets with World Bank Support
articles.summary_en: Key urban water supply and environmental sanitation project in Vietnam, backed by World Bank, surpasses targets.

articles.title_en: Climate-Smart Water Solutions Adopted in Central Vietnam by 2026 via World Bank Program
articles.summary_en: Central Vietnam implements climate-smart water solutions to enhance supply and environmental protection, World Bank confirms.

articles.title_en: JICA Commits Major Loan for Vietnam's Green North-South High-Speed Rail Segment
articles.summary_en: JICA announces a significant ODA loan for a crucial section of Vietnam's high-speed rail, integrating advanced environmental technologies and climate resilience measures.

articles.title_en: JICA Launches New Grant Program for Vietnam's Mekong Delta Climate Resilience
articles.summary_en: JICA initiates a new environmental grant and technical assistance program in Vietnam's Mekong Delta to bolster climate change adaptation, water management, and sustainable agriculture practices.

articles.title_en: JICA Supports Smart City Development and Digital Infrastructure in Ho Chi Minh City
articles.summary_en: JICA extends a comprehensive ODA package, including both loans and grants, to Ho Chi Minh City, focusing on smart urban infrastructure, digital governance, and green technology integration.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's FDI Surge Continues in 2026, Driven by High-Tech and Green Industrial Parks
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's Q1 2026 FDI surges, led by high-tech. Smart, eco-industrial parks attract investors, solidifying its regional hub.

articles.title_en: Major Infrastructure Projects Slated for Completion by 2026 Boost Industrial Park Connectivity
articles.summary_en: Major expressways and port upgrades nearing completion in 2026 boost industrial park logistics, attracting FDI.
articles.source: Ministry of Planning and Investment Report

articles.title_en: Vietnam Prioritizes Sustainable Development and Skilled Workforce for 2026-2030 FDI Strategy
articles.summary_en: Vietnam prioritizes sustainable development, ESG, and skilled labor for IPs. New FDI strategy aims for higher investment quality.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Accelerates Offshore Wind, PDP8 Targets within Reach
articles.summary_en: Major offshore wind projects greenlit, attracting foreign investment. Grid challenges persist but solutions emerge.

articles.title_en: PDP8 Mid-Term Review: Vietnam's Grid Strains Under Renewable Surge
articles.summary_en: Vietnam reviews PDP8 progress. Grid infrastructure struggles with solar/wind influx; new upgrade plans announced.

articles.title_en: Solar Sector Shifts to Rooftop Dominance, Attracts Green Bonds
articles.summary_en: Utility-scale solar cools as rooftop installations boom. Green bond market fuels Vietnam's renewable energy growth.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 Commences Trial Operations, Reshaping Southern Vietnam's Aviation
articles.summary_en: Long Thanh International Airport's first phase begins trial operations, marking a significant step for Vietnam's aviation. Set to be a regional hub, it eases Tan Son Nhat congestion and boosts economic growth.

articles.title_en: New Expressways Fully Operational, Solidifying Long Thanh Airport's Regional Connectivity
articles.summary_en: Key expressways like Ben Luc-Long Thanh and Bien Hoa-Vung Tau are fully open, greatly improving access to Long Thanh Airport. Enhances logistics, passenger flow, and regional economic growth.

articles.title_en: HCMC Accelerates Feasibility Studies for Long Thanh Airport Metro Link
articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City authorities expedite studies for a dedicated metro line connecting the city center to Long Thanh International Airport. Aims for seamless public transport, with construction expected soon.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City's AI-Powered IOC Revolutionizes Urban Management in 2026
articles.summary_en: HCMC's new AI/IoT-powered IOC is fully operational, revolutionizing traffic, public safety, and environment. A key 2026 smart city milestone.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's 5G Backbone Strengthens Smart City Digital Infrastructure Ahead of 2026 Targets
articles.summary_en: By 2026, Vietnam significantly expanded its 5G and secure cloud network, boosting digital foundations for smart city IOCs nationwide.

articles.title_en: Da Nang Unveils Next-Gen Smart City IOC with Focus on Disaster Resilience and Tourism Data in 2026
articles.summary_en: Da Nang's 2026 IOC leverages IoT/AI for disaster resilience and tourism optimization, enhancing safety and appeal.
